pages.text: Use an Enlightenment Pill to step from mortal life into Qi Refining.$(br2)The stat menu shows qi, realm, max health, max age, luck, moral, soul, thoughts, spirit roots, and cultivation progress.
Qi appears above the hunger bar. Mortals can still see the qi bar, but they do not naturally regenerate qi.$(br2)Meditation requires standing on the ground and stops movement while active.
